zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg於1230年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林時，他的父親Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg28歲，母親Luitgard of Henneberg19歲。他於1259年與Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1272年被列為fürst von mecklenburg。他去世於1302年1月2日在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗享年72歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg于1230年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林时，他的父亲Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg28岁，母亲Luitgard of Henneberg19岁。他于1259年与Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1272年被列为fürst von mecklenburg。他去世于1302年1月2日在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗享年72岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗多朗。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: "der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Pilger"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Pilgrim , shortened from Middle High German pilgerīm.

variants.name: Pilcher
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for a maker or seller of pilches, from an agent derivative of Pilch . In early 17th-century English, pilcher was a popular term of abuse, being confused or punningly associated with the unrelated verb pilch ‘to steal’ and with the unrelated noun pilchard, a kind of fish.

variants.name: Pehl
meanings: A male name derived from Peregrine.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg was born in 1230, in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, was 28 and his mother, Luitgard of Henneberg, was 19. He married Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita in 1259. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1272, his occupation is listed as fürst von mecklenburg. He died on 2 January 1302, in Bad Doberan, Rostock, East Germany, at the age of 72, and was buried in Doberan, Doberan, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg est né en 1230, à Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Luitgard of Henneberg, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita en 1259. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1272, sa profession de son indiquée est fürst von mecklenburg. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1302, à Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg 1230 in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg 28 und seine Mutter Luitgard of Henneberg 19. Er hat 1259 Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1272 ist sein Beruf als fürst von mecklenburg aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Januar 1302 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik und wurde in Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg è nato il nel 1230 nel Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Luitgard of Henneberg, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita nel 1259. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1272, la sua occupazione è indicata come fürst von mecklenburg. Morì il 2 gennaio 1302, nel Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Germania Est, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburgが1230年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンスチウエリンで生まれた時，父Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburgは28歳，母Luitgard of Hennebergは19歳であった。1259年にAnastazja Barnimówna Gryfitaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1272年，職業はfürst von mecklenburgと記録されている。彼は1302年1月2日に東德ロストッククレイス バド ドバーアンで72歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト ドバーアンドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg(이)가 1230년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인 슈워인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Luitgard of Henneberg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1259년 Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1272년, 그의 직업은 fürst von mecklenburg이었다. 그는 1302년 1월 2일 동독 로스톡 크레이스 바드 도베란에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg nasceu em 1230, em Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard of Henneberg, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita em 1259. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1272, sua profissão aparece como fürst von mecklenburg. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1302, em Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg родился в 1230 г. в местности щвирин, щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard of Henneberg, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita в 1259 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1272 году он работал по профессии fürst von mecklenburg. Он умер 2 января 1302 г. в местности крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности добиран, стадт добиран, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg nació en 1230, en Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Luitgard of Henneberg, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita en 1259. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1272, su ocupación registrada era fürst von mecklenburg. Murió el 2 de enero de 1302, en Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Alemania Oriental, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
